title: CustomActionCreationFields
content:
# CustomActionCreationFields


## Properties

- **type** (`string`): The type of the action. This is used to identify the action in the system.
- **type_title** (`string`): The type name of the action.
- **resource** (`string`): 
- **title** (`string`): The title of the action. This is a short description of the action that will be displayed to the user.
- **description** (`string`): The description of the action. This is a longer description of the action that will be displayed to the user.
- **expiration_date** (`string`): The expiration date of the action. The action will be automatically cancelled if it is not completed by this date.
- **payload** (`object`): The payload is a JSON object that contains the necessary information for the executor to perform the action. The structure of the payload will depend on the action type.
- **trace_id** (`string`):
summary: Object with properties: type, type_title, resource, title, description

type.description: The type of the action. This is used to identify the action in the system.

type_title.description: The type name of the action.

title.description: The title of the action. This is a short description of the action that will be displayed to the user.

description.example: Beam Pump GW-B12-037 needs to be diagnosed.
description.description: The description of the action. This is a longer description of the action that will be displayed to the user.

expiration_date.description: The expiration date of the action. The action will be automatically cancelled if it is not completed by this date.

payload.description: The payload is a JSON object that contains the necessary information for the executor to perform the action. The structure of the payload will depend on the action type.
